description: Item quality ratio definitions per monster level - controls drop rates for unique, rare, set, magic, superior, and normal items.

Uber.description: Whether this row applies to exceptional/elite base items

Class Specific.description: Whether this row applies to class-specific items

Unique.description: Base ratio for unique item quality chance

UniqueDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for unique item chance

UniqueMin.description: Minimum unique item chance after calculation

Rare.description: Base ratio for rare item quality chance

RareDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for rare item chance

RareMin.description: Minimum rare item chance after calculation

Set.description: Base ratio for set item quality chance

SetDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for set item chance

SetMin.description: Minimum set item chance after calculation

Magic.description: Base ratio for magic item quality chance

MagicDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for magic item chance

MagicMin.description: Minimum magic item chance after calculation

HiQuality.description: Base ratio for superior item quality chance

HiQualityDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for superior item chance

Normal.description: Base ratio for normal item quality chance

NormalDivisor.description: Divisor applied to monster level for normal item chance
